prose.en: Identified vulnerabilities and deviations are subject to risk assessment in accordance with the risk management procedure (cf. OIS-07) and follow-up measures are defined and tracked (cf. OPS-18).

guidance.en: The review of the security requirements depends on the measures implemented to design the networks, e.g. monitoring and reviewing firewall rules or log files for abnormalities as well as visual inspections of physical network components for changes.
